name: bc-bench
description: Inspired by SWE-Bench, for Business Central ecosystem

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && esbuild src/extension.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/extension.js --external:vscode --format=cjs --platform=node --sourcemap
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && esbuild src/extension.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/extension.js --external:vscode --format=cjs --platform=node --minify
